calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
William Edward Weiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sarah Classen Taylor, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Proposed Judgment received in court.

July 11, 2005
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Nicholle Euradeil Simon and Bobby Yamamoto as follows:
Damages $169,633.00
Costs $314.00, for a total of $169,947.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Default Prove-Up
